CustomField.description: Percentage discount applied to Pickup (return) trips at Step 7. The engine formula: if Direction = Pickup → price = price × (1 - Return_Discount_Pct / 100). Applied BEFORE supplements. Value 20 means 20% discount.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Discount % for return trips (Pickup direction). Enter 20 for 20%. Applied before supplements.
CustomField.label: Return Discount Pct
